---
id: patch-channels-channel-id-integrations-channel-integration-id
title: 'Patch /channels/{channelId}/integrations/{channelIntegrationId}'
description: 'Update a channel integration.'
sidebar_label: 'Patch /channels/{channelId}/integrations/{channelIntegrationId}'
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: 'patch api-method'
info_path: ads/api/reference/optiview-ads-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from '@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint';
import ParamsDetails from '@theme/ParamsDetails';
import RequestSchema from '@theme/RequestSchema';
import StatusCodes from '@theme/StatusCodes';
import OperationTabs from '@theme/OperationTabs';
import TabItem from '@theme/TabItem';
import Heading from '@theme/Heading';
import Translate from '@docusaurus/Translate';

<Heading as={'h1'} className={'openapi__heading'} children={'Patch /channels/{channelId}/integrations/{channelIntegrationId}'}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={'patch'} path={'/api/v1/channels/{channelId}/integrations/{channelIntegrationId}'} context={'endpoint'}></MethodEndpoint>

Update a channel integration.

<Heading id={'request'} as={'h2'} className={'openapi-tabs__heading'}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[
    { description: 'Identifier of the channel.', in: 'path', name: 'channelId', required: true, schema: { type: 'string' } },
    { description: 'Identifier of the channel integration.', in: 'path', name: 'channelIntegrationId', required: true, schema: { type: 'string' } },
  ]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={'Body'}
  body={{
    content: {
      'application/json': {
        schema: {
          oneOf: [
            {
              properties: {
                daiAssetKeys: {
                  description:
                    'Google DAI asset keys for the server-side (SSAI) path. At least one is required; duplicate keys are removed. Each key may back at most one channel integration within an organization.',
                  items: { minLength: 1, type: 'string' },
                  minItems: 1,
                  type: 'array',
                },
                type: {
                  description: 'Channel integration type discriminator. `SSAI_DAI`: Google DAI server-side ad insertion.',
                  enum: ['SSAI_DAI'],
                  type: 'string',
                },
              },
              required: ['type', 'daiAssetKeys'],
              type: 'object',
            },
          ],
        },
      },
    },
    required: true,
  }}
></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  responses={{
    '200': {
      content: {
        'application/json': {
          schema: {
            additionalProperties: false,
            properties: {
              channelId: { description: 'Identifier of the channel this integration belongs to.', type: 'string' },
              createdAt: { description: 'Timestamp when the channel integration was created, as an ISO 8601 datetime string.', type: 'string' },
              daiAssetKeys: { description: 'Google DAI asset keys for the server-side (SSAI) path.', items: { type: 'string' }, type: 'array' },
              id: { description: 'Unique channel integration identifier within the channel.', type: 'string' },
              type: {
                description: 'Channel integration type. Currently only `SSAI_DAI` (Google DAI server-side ad insertion).',
                enum: ['SSAI_DAI'],
                type: 'string',
              },
            },
            required: ['id', 'channelId', 'type', 'createdAt'],
            type: 'object',
          },
        },
      },
      description: 'Default Response',
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
